creator: claude.com

evidence.text: Figma also introduced an experimental models setting, giving users access to the latest releases—including the new Claude Opus 4.6—as soon as they're available in Figma Make. "Claude Opus 4.6 generates complex, interactive apps and prototypes in Figma Make with an impressive creative range," said Loredana Crisan, Chief Design Officer at Figma. "The model translates detailed designs and multi-layered tasks into code on the first try, making it a powerful starting point for teams to explore and build ideas." The experimental setting lets teams push the boundaries with new capabilities as Claude continues to evolve.
